description: 15 MHz function and arbitrary waveform generator with AM/FM/FSK modulation, burst, linear/log frequency sweep, and downloadable arbitrary waveforms. Programmable via SCPI over GPIB (IEEE-488) or RS-232.

commands.name: apply_sinusoid
commands.description: Outputs a sine wave with the specified frequency, amplitude, and offset in a single command.

commands.name: apply_square
commands.description: Outputs a square wave with the specified frequency, amplitude, and offset.

commands.name: apply_triangle
commands.description: Outputs a triangle wave with the specified frequency, amplitude, and offset.

commands.name: apply_ramp
commands.description: Outputs a ramp wave with the specified frequency, amplitude, and offset.

commands.name: apply_noise
commands.description: Outputs noise with the specified amplitude and offset. The frequency parameter is ignored but a value or DEFault must be specified.

commands.name: apply_dc
commands.description: Outputs a DC voltage. Frequency and amplitude parameters are ignored but a value or DEFault must be specified; the offset sets the DC level.

commands.name: apply_user
commands.description: Outputs the arbitrary waveform currently selected by FUNCtion:USER, with the specified frequency, amplitude, and offset.

commands.name: apply_query
commands.description: Queries the current function, frequency, amplitude, and offset configuration.

commands.name: set_function
commands.description: Selects the output function (waveform shape).

commands.name: set_frequency
commands.description: Sets the output frequency. Range depends on the selected function.

commands.name: set_pulse_duty_cycle
commands.description: Sets the duty cycle in percent for square waves.

commands.name: set_voltage
commands.description: Sets the output amplitude. Range depends on the selected function and output termination.

commands.name: set_voltage_offset
commands.description: Sets the DC offset voltage.

commands.name: set_voltage_unit
commands.description: Selects the units used to specify output amplitude.

commands.name: set_output_load
commands.description: Specifies the output termination (load impedance) for amplitude and offset.

commands.name: set_output_sync
commands.description: Enables or disables the front-panel Sync signal output.

commands.name: set_am_depth
commands.description: Sets the amplitude modulation depth in percent.

commands.name: set_am_internal_function
commands.description: Selects the internal modulating waveform shape for AM.

commands.name: set_am_internal_frequency
commands.description: Sets the internal modulating frequency for AM.

commands.name: set_am_source
commands.description: Selects the source of the AM modulating signal.

commands.name: set_am_state
commands.description: Enables or disables amplitude modulation.

commands.name: set_fm_deviation
commands.description: Sets the peak frequency deviation in Hz for frequency modulation.

commands.name: set_fm_internal_function
commands.description: Selects the internal modulating waveform shape for FM.

commands.name: set_fm_internal_frequency
commands.description: Sets the internal modulating frequency for FM.

commands.name: set_fm_state
commands.description: Enables or disables frequency modulation.

commands.name: set_burst_ncycles
commands.description: Sets the number of cycles per burst.

commands.name: set_burst_phase
commands.description: Sets the starting phase angle of a burst in degrees.

commands.name: set_burst_internal_rate
commands.description: Sets the internal burst rate (frequency).

commands.name: set_burst_source
commands.description: Selects the burst source (gated burst mode).

commands.name: set_burst_state
commands.description: Enables or disables burst modulation.

commands.name: set_fsk_frequency
commands.description: Sets the FSK 'hop' (alternate) frequency.

commands.name: set_fsk_internal_rate
commands.description: Sets the internal rate at which output shifts between carrier and hop frequency.

commands.name: set_fsk_source
commands.description: Selects the internal or external source for the FSK rate.

commands.name: set_fsk_state
commands.description: Enables or disables FSK (frequency-shift keying) modulation.

commands.name: set_frequency_start
commands.description: Sets the start frequency for a frequency sweep.

commands.name: set_frequency_stop
commands.description: Sets the stop frequency for a frequency sweep.

commands.name: set_sweep_spacing
commands.description: Selects linear or logarithmic spacing for the frequency sweep.

commands.name: set_sweep_time
commands.description: Sets the number of seconds required to sweep from start to stop frequency.

commands.name: set_sweep_state
commands.description: Enables or disables the frequency sweep mode.

commands.name: set_function_user
commands.description: Selects one of the built-in or a user-defined arbitrary waveform to be output when FUNCtion:SHAPe USER is active.

parameters.name: arb_name
parameters.range: built-in waveform, user-defined name, or VOLATILE

commands.name: download_data_volatile
commands.description: Downloads floating-point values (between -1 and +1) into volatile memory as an arbitrary waveform.

commands.name: download_data_dac
commands.description: Downloads integer DAC values into volatile memory as an arbitrary waveform, as a binary block or comma-separated values.

parameters.name: values
parameters.range: integer DAC codes; binary block or value list

commands.name: query_data_average
commands.description: Queries the arithmetic average of all data points for the specified arbitrary waveform.

commands.name: query_data_cfactor
commands.description: Queries the crest factor of the specified arbitrary waveform.

commands.name: query_data_points
commands.description: Queries the number of points in the specified arbitrary waveform.

commands.name: query_data_ptpeak
commands.description: Queries the peak-to-peak value of the specified arbitrary waveform.

commands.name: query_data_catalog
commands.description: Lists the names of all waveforms currently in memory (built-in, user, and volatile).

commands.name: copy_data
commands.description: Copies the waveform from volatile memory to a named waveform in non-volatile memory.

commands.name: delete_data
commands.description: Deletes the specified arbitrary waveform from memory.

commands.name: delete_data_all
commands.description: Deletes all user-defined arbitrary waveforms from memory.

commands.name: query_data_nvolatile_catalog
commands.description: Lists the names of all user-defined arbitrary waveforms in non-volatile memory.

commands.name: query_data_nvolatile_free
commands.description: Queries the number of non-volatile memory slots free to store user-defined waveforms.

commands.name: set_format_border
commands.description: Specifies the byte order used for binary block transfers of DAC data.

commands.name: set_trigger_source
commands.description: Selects the trigger source for triggered burst and sweep modes.

commands.name: set_trigger_slope
commands.description: Selects whether triggering occurs on the rising or falling edge of the external trigger signal.

commands.name: trigger
commands.description: Triggers a burst or sweep from the remote interface when the bus (software) trigger source is selected.

commands.name: set_display
commands.description: Turns the front-panel display on or off.

commands.name: set_display_text
commands.description: Displays a text message on the front-panel display.

commands.name: clear_display_text
commands.description: Clears the text message shown on the front-panel display.

commands.name: system_beep
commands.description: Issues a single beep from the function generator.

commands.name: query_system_error
commands.description: Reads and clears one error from the error queue.

commands.name: query_system_version
commands.description: Queries the SCPI version the instrument complies with.

commands.name: system_local
commands.description: Places the function generator in local mode (RS-232 interface).

commands.name: system_remote
commands.description: Places the function generator in remote mode (RS-232 interface).

commands.name: system_rwlock
commands.description: Places the function generator in remote mode with the front-panel keys locked out (RS-232 interface).

commands.name: calibration_query
commands.description: Performs a calibration and returns a value indicating whether calibration succeeded.

commands.name: query_calibration_count
commands.description: Queries the number of times the instrument has been calibrated.

commands.name: set_calibration_secure_code
commands.description: Sets a new calibration security code (instrument must be unsecured).

commands.name: set_calibration_secure_state
commands.description: Secures or unsecures the instrument for calibration using the security code.

commands.name: set_calibration_setup
commands.description: Configures the function generator's internal state for each of the calibration steps.

commands.name: set_calibration_string
commands.description: Stores a message in the calibration memory (e.g. last cal date).

commands.name: set_calibration_value
commands.description: Specifies the value of the known calibration signal applied during calibration.

commands.name: save_state
commands.description: Stores the current instrument state in one of four storage locations. State 0 is the power-down state; states 1-3 are user-defined.

commands.name: recall_state
commands.description: Recalls the instrument state stored in the specified storage location.

commands.name: delete_memory_state
commands.description: Deletes a stored instrument state from the specified location.

commands.name: clear_status
commands.description: Clears the event registers in all register groups and clears the error queue.

commands.name: set_event_status_enable
commands.description: Enables bits in the Standard Event enable register.

commands.name: query_event_status_register
commands.description: Queries the Standard Event register.

commands.name: operation_complete
commands.description: Sets the Operation Complete bit in the Standard Event register after the previous commands complete.

commands.name: set_power_on_status_clear
commands.description: Enables or disables clearing of the Status Byte and Standard Event enable registers at power-on.

commands.name: set_service_request_enable
commands.description: Enables bits in the Status Byte enable register.

commands.name: query_status_byte
commands.description: Queries the Status Byte summary register.

commands.name: wait
commands.description: Waits for all pending operations to complete before executing any additional commands.

commands.name: identify
commands.description: Returns the instrument identification string (manufacturer, model, serial, firmware).

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Resets the function generator to its factory default state.

commands.name: self_test
commands.description: Performs a complete self-test and returns a value indicating pass (0) or fail.
